recent.statement: Tilman Fertitta will face further protests during his yacht tour in Venice
recent.evidence: No captured signal concerns this forecast, and a protest event of this nature would certainly have been captured within the closed window.

recent.statement: A magnitude 4.5 earthquake will strike near Polkowice, Poland
recent.evidence: The only signals describe a magnitude 5.5 earthquake in the Scotia Sea, not any earthquake near Polkowice, Poland, so the forecast event is unsupported.

recent.statement: A magnitude 5.0 earthquake will occur in the Pacific Northwest region of North America within the next 24 hours.
recent.evidence: The only signals report a magnitude 5.5 earthquake in the Scotia Sea, not a magnitude 5.0 event in the Pacific Northwest, and no signal shows the forecast event occurring.

recent.statement: A major wildfire will break out in California
recent.evidence: No captured signal concerns this forecast, and a major California wildfire would certainly have been captured within the closed window.

recent.statement: A magnitude 6+ earthquake will hit the coast of Mexico
recent.evidence: The only in-window Mexico earthquake (S3) was magnitude 5.7M, below the required 6+ threshold, while the M6+ events (S4, S5) occurred on 07/17 before the forecast window.

recent.statement: A magnitude 6+ earthquake will hit Mexico within the next 24h
recent.evidence: The only in-window Mexico earthquake (S3) was magnitude 5.7M, below the 6+ threshold, and the M6/M7.3 events (S4, S5) occurred on 07-17 before the forecast window.

recent.statement: A magnitude 6.5 earthquake will occur in Mexico within the next 24 hours
recent.evidence: Within the 7/18–7/19 window only a 5.7M quake struck Mexico (S3), below the 6.5 threshold; the 7.3M quake (S5) occurred on 7/17, before the window.

recent.statement: A magnitude 6.5 earthquake will occur in Mexico within the next 24 hours
recent.evidence: Within the 24h window only S3 (5.7M on 18/07) occurred in Mexico, below the 6.5 threshold, while the larger S4/S5 quakes predate the window on 17/07.

recent.statement: A new earthquake with a magnitude of at least 6.0 will occur in Mexico within the next 24 hours.
recent.evidence: The only in-window Mexico quake (S3) was 5.7M, below the 6.0 threshold, while the 6.0M+ events (S4, S5) occurred on 17/07 before the forecast window began.

recent.statement: A significant earthquake will occur in the Philippines within the next 24 hours
recent.evidence: Both signals describe an earthquake in the Scotia Sea, not the Philippines, so no signal shows a significant Philippine earthquake occurred within the window.

recent.statement: A magnitude 6.5 earthquake will hit Mexico within the next 24 hours
recent.evidence: Within the forecast window, the only Mexico earthquake captured (S3) was magnitude 5.7M, below the 6.5 threshold, and larger quakes (S4, S5) occurred on 17/07 before the forecast window opened.

recent.statement: A severe thunderstorm warning will be issued for the Atlanta metropolitan area
recent.evidence: No captured signal provides any evidence about a severe thunderstorm warning for Atlanta within the window.
